task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go has Source and Destination fields with correct 'source' and 'destination' json tags; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go correctly POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go validates source/destination, copies the model via CopyModel(), removes the source manifest, and cleans up unused layers; (4) Returns 404 (StatusNotFound) when source is missing and 409 (StatusConflict) when destination exists; (5) Route r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) is properly registered; (6) CLI command 'ollama rename' uses cobra.ExactArgs(2) correctly; (7) CLI RenameHandler function properly creates client, builds RenameRequest with args[0] and args[1], and calls client.Rename(); (8) No existing test files are modified. Implementation is complete and correct.
